transcript: 作为独生女则娜得自己找乐子比如假装有狮子在追她快速奔跑让她异常兴奋她的速度可达每小时65公里已经足以媲美她的妈妈了对于刚出生两天的动物宝宝来说谢谢大家小时六十五公里已经足以媲美她的妈妈了对于刚出生两天的动物宝宝来说这已经很不错了回到爱丁堡我们来参观一下马来墨馆这是马来墨赛扬的家在经历了一年多的孕期之后赛扬在四天前生下了自己的幼崽这是梅格他已经会走了并对这个世界充满了好奇瞧他正用自己的小鼻子四处嗅探呢谢谢大家它已经会走了并对这个世界充满了好奇瞧它正用自己的小鼻子四处嗅探呢在野外马来墨幼崽身上的花纹在光影斑驳的森林地面上是很好的伪装而妈妈身上的对比色也能让它在森林中不容易被发现数月时间里梅格身上的花纹也会慢慢变得和妈妈的一样这天清晨妈妈被关在了门外梅格平静的生活一下就被打乱了虽然妈妈不想离开自己的幼崽平静的生活一下就被打乱了。虽然妈妈不想离开自己的幼崽,但是照料者需要给梅格做体检。因为梅格不仅仅是她妈妈的宝贝。要知道,马来墨是冰危动物物面临灭绝的危险像梅格这样在繁育项目中出生的马莱木幼崽也许有一天会成为该物种的希望大家好今天我要给你们画牙 paint my nails for youCause I'm so girlyNo, really it's becauseI used to get manicures all the timeBut then I was sick of spending money on themSo I got myself a good nail polish collectionLots of cheap onesWet and wildAnybody remember wet and wild from the 90s?Just ignore my dogs that are wrestling behind me right now. Hey! Quit putting on a show, you two! HETCH! I just Cesar Millan'd them. Gotta obviously remove the old nail polish. So I use pure acetone because I feel like it removes the nail polish a lot better than non-acetone remover. However, I do feel like I'm inhaling poison when I do this. So that's your call. Gotta get those cuticles clean, if you know what I mean. You never know where you're gonna be sticking those fingers next. I like to file first. I don't have any tricks for this. I don't honestly know what I'm doing when it comes to filing. I just try to get them so that they're not ratchet anymore, as the kids say. Now I have cuticle oil here I like to put on because because this is what they do at the salon, and I like to feel as close to the salon as possible. Now while this oil is setting in, I'm gonna pick out my color, and I'm gonna get out all of the tools necessary for after when my nails are wet. You should get one of these little tiny brushes, because that's how I clean up my spills. My bottom coat, my color, my top coat. I've got my brush out so that I don't have to dig for it with wet nails afterwards now I'm gonna go wash my hands to get the remaining oil off and we'll be ready to paint okay hands are washed of oil we are filed and ready to paint and the dogs are barking the bottom coat is real easy no one needs help putting on clear nail polish, am I right? Okay, base coat is done. I'm going to zoom the camera in so you can see me paint the nails. I think the key with the nail polish is to start in the center and work your way up. So don't worry about mistakes. You can always clean up afterwards. That's why the acetone is so great Time for second coat Two coats done looks pretty messy, but here's where I Come in with magic you take your nail polish remover again, I the acetone professional and you pour some into the cap so now you go and you wipe up your mess you got some on the skin swipe people are so intimidated to paint their own nails because they get it all over but it doesn't matter because you can clean it up I feel pretty so pretty get in here little brush you get in there and it's so much less frustrating when you do your own nails and the nail polish chips a few days later than when you paid money to get your nails done in the nail polish chips. That used to drive me crazy. So now it's time for the top coat. These little stubs of a nail. Stub-a-roonies. Stub hub. Alright so they're finished and they may not be salon quality nails but they're totally socially acceptable in the public nails if you have any questions for me about my sweet nail techniques tweet me at Angie green up and I'll answer them what do you think of of my nails? See, they like them. See you tomorrow. This is Hugo. Say hi, Hugo.
